zh.lifeSummary: 當Margery Davenport於1453年出生在英國爾亨波瑞時，她的父親Hugh Davenport III24歲，母親Joan de Wotton25歲。她於1461年與Ralph Davenport在英國爾達文波特 在 斯托普特結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1511年之後在英國爾達文波特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margery Davenport于1453年出生在英国爾亨波瑞时，她的父亲Hugh Davenport III24岁，母亲Joan de Wotton25岁。她于1461年与Ralph Davenport在英国爾達文波特 在 斯托普特结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1511年之后在英国爾達文波特。

nameMeanings.name: Davenport
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire and Cheshire): habitational name from a place in Cheshire named Davenport, from the Dane river (apparently named with a Celtic cognate of Middle Welsh dafnu ‘to drop, to trickle’) + Old English port ‘market town’.

Irish: in Tipperary, this is an English surname adopted by bearers of Munster Gaelic Ó Donndubhartaigh ‘descendant of Donndubhartach’, a personal name composed of the elements donn ‘brown-haired man’ or ‘chieftain’ + dubh ‘black’ + artach ‘nobleman’.
History: John Davenport (died 1670) arrived in Boston, MA, in 1637. He came of an English Cheshire family associated with Capesthorne Hall, near Macclesfield.

variants.name: Devenport
meanings: English and Irish (Lancashire): variant of Davenport . The spelling Devonport is found in Ireland and it may have been this form which gave rise to Devenport.

variants.name: Dunworth
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Eamon, Niall.
Irish: adopted in Ireland by bearers of Gaelic Ó Donndubhartaigh (see Davenport 2).
English: perhaps a variant of Dungworth, see Dunsworth .

nameMeanings.name: Margery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual medieval vernacular form of   Margaret   (now also commonly spelled   Marjorie  ). This form of the name is preserved in the nursery rhyme ‘See-saw, Margery Daw’.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Margery Davenport was born in 1453, in Henbury, Cheshire, England, her father, Hugh Davenport III, was 24 and her mother, Joan de Wotton, was 25. She married Ralph Davenport in 1461, in Davenport in Stockport, Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 4 daughters. She died after 1511, in Davenport, Cheshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margery Davenport est née en 1453, à Henbury, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Hugh Davenport III, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Joan de Wotton, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Ralph Davenport en 1461, à Davenport in Stockport, Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée après 1511, à Davenport, Cheshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margery Davenport 1453 in Henbury, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hugh Davenport III 24 und ihre Mutter Joan de Wotton 25. Sie hat 1461 in Davenport in Stockport, Cheshire, England Ralph Davenport geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb nach 1511 in Davenport, Cheshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margery Davenport è nata il nel 1453 nel Henbury, Cheshire, England, sua padre, Hugh Davenport III, aveva 24 anni e sua madre, Joan de Wotton, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato Ralph Davenport nel 1461, nel Davenport in Stockport, Cheshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 4 figlie. Morì dopo il 1511, nel Davenport, Cheshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Margery Davenportが1453年にイギリスチェシュアイアヘンブリーで生まれた時，父Hugh Davenport IIIは24歳，母Joan de Wottonは25歳であった。1461年にイギリスチェシュアイアダベンプオルト イン ストクプオルトでRalph Davenportと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1511年以後にイギリスチェシュアイアダベンプオルトで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margery Davenport(이)가 1453년 영국 체실르 헨버이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hugh Davenport III(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan de Wotton(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1461년 영국 체실르 대븐포트 인 스톡포트에서 Ralph Davenport(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1511년 이후 영국 체실르 대븐포트에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margery Davenport nasceu em 1453, em Henbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Hugh Davenport III, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Joan de Wotton, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com Ralph Davenport em 1461, em Davenport in Stockport, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu após 1511, em Davenport, Cheshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margery Davenport родилась в 1453 г. в местности хенбури, чешир, Англия, её отцу по имени Hugh Davenport III было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Joan de Wotton, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Ralph Davenport в 1461 г. в местности давенпорт ин стоккпорт, чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла после 1511 г. в местности давенпорт, чешир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margery Davenport nació en 1453, en Henbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Hugh Davenport III, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Joan de Wotton, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Ralph Davenport en 1461, en Davenport in Stockport, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió después de 1511, en Davenport, Cheshire, Inglaterra.
